title: Magically Crispy Ukrainian Meat Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring crispy meat dumplings served with a sweet and tangy jam, perfect for a hangover cure. This low-glycemic-friendly recipe uses papillote to create a crispy exterior and a tender interior.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, chopped onion, minced garlic, beaten egg, and a pinch of salt and pepper, and mix well.
Gradually add the buckwheat flour to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Place a ball of dough onto the center of a papillote paper square, and fold the paper into a triangle to form a dumpling.
Repeat the process with the remaining dough and papillote paper.
Place the dumplings onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the dumplings are baking, heat the strawberry jam in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Serve the crispy dumplings with the warm strawberry jam and a side of sour cream or yogurt, if desired.
